name: unia-emotion
description: UNIA-Emotion: asistente emocional con detección facial y chatbot empático

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm -w backend run dev" "npm -w frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w backend run build && npm -w frontend run build
scripts.test: npm -w backend run test && npm -w frontend run test
scripts.lint: npm -w backend run lint && npm -w frontend run lint
